title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Croma Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Croma Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Croma Digital Technologies! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Madurai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Croma Digital Technologies:
Croma Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Croma Digital Technologies!
